channel.title: ProbBrain - AI News Terminal
channel.description: AI lab announcements, arXiv papers, GitHub and HuggingFace trending, AI Hacker News, and independent writers - aggregated, deduped, and posted to @ProbBrain on Telegram.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] FixItFlow: Automated Troubleshooting Guide Generation from Cloud Incidents
item.description: FixItFlow generates troubleshooting guides from cloud incidents using LLMs, reducing mitigation time 2.3x with 61.5% positive user ratings.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Ask Before You Diagnose: Safe-Psych, a Sequential Evaluation Benchmark for LLMs in Psychiatry
item.description: Safe-Psych benchmark reveals LLMs struggle with incomplete clinical information in psychiatry, prematurely diagnosing without sufficient evidence and rarely seeking clarification.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] The Perplexity Trap: When Patent Law Makes Human Writing Look Like AI
item.description: EPO's 2026 patent guidelines require LLM detection, but AI detectors fail with 60%+ false positives because human patent writing mirrors LLM output patterns.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Do LLMs Need Architectural Changes for Simultaneous Speech Translation? A Prefix-to-Prefix Data Driven Approach
item.description: Researchers propose prefix-to-prefix data-driven approach for simultaneous speech translation in LLMs, achieving improved quality without architectural modifications.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] What Models Express, Suppress, and Resist: Auditing Open-Weight LLMs with Persona Vectors
item.description: Researchers use persona vectors to systematically probe 53 behavioral traits in open-weight LLMs, revealing which behaviors are naturally expressed, steerably latent, or resistant to extraction.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Text2Sign: A Single-GPU Diffusion Baseline for Text-to-Sign Language Video Generation
item.description: Text2Sign generates sign language video from text using a diffusion model that runs on a single NVIDIA L4 GPU.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] RAGthoven at SemEval-2026 Task 1: A Multi-Stage Pipeline Walks Into a Benchmark and Barely Clears the Bar
item.description: RAGthoven, a multi-stage LLM pipeline with RAG-augmented humor generation, ties with Gemini 2.5 Flash baseline on SemEval-2026 multilingual humor task.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Adaptive Filtering of the KV Cache: Diagnosing and Correcting Structural-Role Bias in LLM Inference
item.description: Study identifies and addresses structural-role bias in KV cache eviction for long-context LLMs, proposing a role-conditional filtering method that improves accuracy on schema-dense inputs.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] GSM-Plus-BN: A Perturbation-Based Benchmark for Bangla Mathematical Reasoning in Large Language Models
item.description: GSM-Plus-BN: A Perturbation-Based Benchmark for Bangla Mathematical Reasoning in Large Language Models

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Discourse-Aware Policy Analysis with Argumentation: A Hybrid LLM-Symbolic Framework for Disaster Governance
item.description: Discourse-Aware Policy Analysis with Argumentation: A Hybrid LLM-Symbolic Framework for Disaster Governance

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Finding the Right Tables and Columns: A Benchmark and Corpus-Adaptive Embeddings for SQL Schema Retrieval
item.description: Finding the Right Tables and Columns: A Benchmark and Corpus-Adaptive Embeddings for SQL Schema Retrieval

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Meta-Learning Preferences for Multilingual LLM Alignment
item.description: Meta-Learning Preferences for Multilingual LLM Alignment

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Evaluation Ability Does Not Imply Optimization Utility: LLM-as-a-Judge Signals in Closed-Loop Table Recognition
item.description: Evaluation Ability Does Not Imply Optimization Utility: LLM-as-a-Judge Signals in Closed-Loop Table Recognition

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] A POS Tier Is the Key to Automated Annotation for Low-Resource Language Documentation: Neural Interlinear Glossing for Irabu, a Southern Ryukyuan Language
item.description: A POS Tier Is the Key to Automated Annotation for Low-Resource Language Documentation: Neural Interlinear Glossing for Irabu, a Southern Ryukyuan Language

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] GFlowRL: Scaling Distribution-Matching RL to Large Language Models
item.description: GFlowRL: Scaling Distribution-Matching RL to Large Language Models

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Demystifying On-Policy Distillation: Roles, Pathologies, and Regulations
item.description: Demystifying On-Policy Distillation: Roles, Pathologies, and Regulations

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Exploring Post-Training Alignment of Small Language Models for Biomedical Data-to-Text Generation: A Case Study of Medication Leaflet
item.description: Exploring Post-Training Alignment of Small Language Models for Biomedical Data-to-Text Generation: A Case Study of Medication Leaflet

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] When Rubrics Change: Cross-Rubric Generalization for Critical Thinking Essay Scoring
item.description: When Rubrics Change: Cross-Rubric Generalization for Critical Thinking Essay Scoring

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Live Gurbani Tracking: A Benchmark and Reference System for Captioning Sikh Kirtan
item.description: Live Gurbani Tracking: A Benchmark and Reference System for Captioning Sikh Kirtan

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] DevicesWorld: Benchmarking Cross-Device Agents in Heterogeneous Environments
item.description: DevicesWorld: Benchmarking Cross-Device Agents in Heterogeneous Environments

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] MyAG: A Graph-Based Framework for Designing and Analyzing Composable LLM Agent Systems
item.description: MyAG: A Graph-Based Framework for Designing and Analyzing Composable LLM Agent Systems

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Cost-Pragmatic Quality Gating and Selection-Fusion Multi-Model Combiners for BioASQ Phases A+ and B
item.description: Cost-Pragmatic Quality Gating and Selection-Fusion Multi-Model Combiners for BioASQ Phases A+ and B

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Graded Entity-Familiarity Readouts in Language Models: Polish Adaptation, Cross-Language Robustness, and Refusal Steering
item.description: Graded Entity-Familiarity Readouts in Language Models: Polish Adaptation, Cross-Language Robustness, and Refusal Steering

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Memory as a Controlled Process: Learned Adaptive Memory Management for LLM Agents
item.description: Memory as a Controlled Process: Learned Adaptive Memory Management for LLM Agents

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Analogical Deep Research: Retrieving and Integrating Historical Analogies for Foresight Analysis
item.description: Analogical Deep Research: Retrieving and Integrating Historical Analogies for Foresight Analysis

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Self-Evolving Agent Harnesses via Gated Semantic Quality-Diversity
item.description: Self-Evolving Agent Harnesses via Gated Semantic Quality-Diversity

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] The Test Oracle Problem in Synthetic LLM-as-Judge Corpora: Disappearance, Distortion and a Validation Protocol
item.description: The Test Oracle Problem in Synthetic LLM-as-Judge Corpora: Disappearance, Distortion and a Validation Protocol

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Self-supervised Speech Comparison for L2 Phone, Rhythm, and Intonation Scoring
item.description: Self-supervised Speech Comparison for L2 Phone, Rhythm, and Intonation Scoring

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Post-Training Shifts Confidence: A Three-Stage Analysis of How SFT, RL, and OPD Shape Pre-, Intra-, and Post-CoT Calibration
item.description: Post-Training Shifts Confidence: A Three-Stage Analysis of How SFT, RL, and OPD Shape Pre-, Intra-, and Post-CoT Calibration

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] SPyCE: Skill-Policy Co-evolution for Multimodal Agents
item.description: SPyCE: Skill-Policy Co-evolution for Multimodal Agents

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Automatic Differentiation from Scratch: How PyTorch Computes Gradients in Physics-Informed Neural Networks
item.description: Paper traces PyTorch's automatic differentiation for Physics-Informed Neural Networks, which require computing physics derivatives and parameter gradients simultaneously.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Beyond Backbone Backpropagation: A Decoupled Strategy for Efficient Transfer Learning
item.description: Method decouples feature extraction from classifier optimization in transfer learning, reducing training time and computational cost while maintaining performance.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Federated Explainable Artificial Intelligence: Roles, Architectures, Evaluation, and Open Challenges
item.description: Survey of Federated Explainable AI combining privacy-preserving collaborative learning with model transparency and interpretability mechanisms.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] What Your Model Threw Away and Why You'll Want It Back: Masking, Fingerprinting, and Privacy from Discarded Geometry
item.description: Study develops framework to identify hidden symmetries in ML models with Lie group actions for privacy and fingerprinting applications.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Targeted Recovery of Weight-Space Mechanisms From Neural Networks
item.description: Targeted parameter decomposition extracts interpretable transformer components for specific inputs while reducing computational requirements to 7% of prior methods.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Uncertainty-Aware Sequential Decision Rules for Event-Triggered LLM Invocation in Streaming Systems
item.description: Risk-based framework optimizes when to invoke expensive LLMs in streaming pipelines, with proven optimality of trigger policies and sublinear regret.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] TSSM: Triaxial State Space Model for Global Station Weather Forecasting with Temporal-Variable-Historical Modeling
item.description: TSSM weather forecasting model incorporates period-aligned historical data to achieve 10% accuracy and 61% extreme-event prediction improvements on Weather-5K dataset.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Disentangling Knowledge States with Ability and Proficiency Modeling for Knowledge Tracing
item.description: Knowledge tracing method decomposes student learning into ability and proficiency phases to better predict student performance.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] STKAN: Kolmogorov-Arnold Networks for Spatio-Temporal Forecasting
item.description: STKAN: Kolmogorov-Arnold Networks for Spatio-Temporal Forecasting

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] A Hybrid Mamba for Audio-Visual Navigation
item.description: A Hybrid Mamba for Audio-Visual Navigation

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] CoDiffGRN: Rethinking Gene Regulatory Network Inference via the BEELINE-KGC Benchmark and Co-evolutionary Discrete Diffusion
item.description: CoDiffGRN: Rethinking Gene Regulatory Network Inference via the BEELINE-KGC Benchmark and Co-evolutionary Discrete Diffusion

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] ShortOPD: Recovering Pruned LLMs with Short-to-Long On-Policy Distillation
item.description: ShortOPD: Recovering Pruned LLMs with Short-to-Long On-Policy Distillation

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] HEDGEHOG: Hierarchical Evaluation of Drug Generators Through Rigorous Filtration
item.description: HEDGEHOG: Hierarchical Evaluation of Drug Generators Through Rigorous Filtration

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] SteinGate: Tail-Sensitive Safe Reinforcement Learning via Stein Discrepancy
item.description: SteinGate: Tail-Sensitive Safe Reinforcement Learning via Stein Discrepancy

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Concurrent Image Understanding and Generation: Self-Correcting Coupled Markov Jump Processes
item.description: Concurrent Image Understanding and Generation: Self-Correcting Coupled Markov Jump Processes

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] EMAGN: Efficient Multi-Attention Graph Network via Learned Clustering for Scalable Traffic Forecasting
item.description: EMAGN: Efficient Multi-Attention Graph Network via Learned Clustering for Scalable Traffic Forecasting

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Reassessing Muon for Matrix Factorization
item.description: Reassessing Muon for Matrix Factorization

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Deconstructing Actor-Critic: A Large-scale Empirical Study of Design Components for Practitioners
item.description: Deconstructing Actor-Critic: A Large-scale Empirical Study of Design Components for Practitioners

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Tabular Foundation Models for Discrete Choice Estimation
item.description: Tabular Foundation Models for Discrete Choice Estimation

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Accuracy-Preserving Stability Regularization for Large-Scale Retail Demand Forecasting
item.description: Accuracy-Preserving Stability Regularization for Large-Scale Retail Demand Forecasting

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Agora: Collective and Permissionless Internet-Scale Pretraining of Large Language Models
item.description: Agora: Collective and Permissionless Internet-Scale Pretraining of Large Language Models

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Weight Feedback Computes the Jacobian Transpose Locally in Modern Deep Networks
item.description: Weight Feedback Computes the Jacobian Transpose Locally in Modern Deep Networks

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Where Should RL Post-Training Compute Go? Model Size, Search, Learning, and Feedback
item.description: Where Should RL Post-Training Compute Go? Model Size, Search, Learning, and Feedback

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Self-Improving is Often Sudden: Enlightenment-style Finetuning for Large-Scale Models
item.description: Self-Improving is Often Sudden: Enlightenment-style Finetuning for Large-Scale Models

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Is the Statistical Advantage Worth the Cost? An Empirical Comparison of KANs and MLPs for Structured Data Classification
item.description: Is the Statistical Advantage Worth the Cost? An Empirical Comparison of KANs and MLPs for Structured Data Classification

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] EXPLORE: Exploration with Guided Search for Analog Topology Generation using Language Models
item.description: EXPLORE: Exploration with Guided Search for Analog Topology Generation using Language Models

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] OrDA: Orthogonal Disentanglement of Access Habits Framework for Homepage Marketing Block Recommendations
item.description: OrDA: Orthogonal Disentanglement of Access Habits Framework for Homepage Marketing Block Recommendations

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Temperature Scaling Is Not Enough: Calibration Gaps Under Human Label Distributions
item.description: Temperature Scaling Is Not Enough: Calibration Gaps Under Human Label Distributions

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Data-Efficient Adaptation of LLMs via Attention Head Reweighting
item.description: Data-Efficient Adaptation of LLMs via Attention Head Reweighting

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] PUe: Biased Positive-Unlabeled Learning Enhancement by Causal Inference
item.description: PUe: Biased Positive-Unlabeled Learning Enhancement by Causal Inference
